footer.title: // Clumove Migration Platform
footer.copyright: © 2026 All rights reserved. Fast and secure transfers for cloud infrastructures.
footer.bufferText: Data transfer is encrypted and ephemeral, passing directly through the gateway's memory. Transfer data is never stored permanently.

auth.name: Name
auth.forgotSent: If an account exists for this email, a link has been sent.
auth.totpLocked: Too many failed attempts. Account locked for 15 minutes.
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account exists for this email, a link has been sent.

appPassword.title: How to create an app password (Nextcloud / WebDAV)
appPassword.step1: Log in to your Nextcloud via the web browser.
appPassword.step2: Click your profile picture in the top right and select Settings.
appPassword.step3: In the left menu, click Security.
appPassword.step4: Scroll all the way down to Devices & clients.
appPassword.step5: Enter an app name (e.g. Clumove) on the left and click Create new app password.
appPassword.step6: Copy the generated password and paste it above (your main password often does not work!).

fileBrowser.title: Select files
fileBrowser.subtitle: // SELECT THE DATA SETS FOR THE TRANSFER RUN
fileBrowser.targetCopied: Copies data sets into the selected folder on the target instance.
fileBrowser.skipDesc: Existing files at the target are not overwritten.
fileBrowser.overwriteDesc: Unconditionally replaces duplicate file names at the target.
fileBrowser.threadsHighWarn: ⚠️ A high thread count increases transfer speed but may trigger server throttling.
fileBrowser.threadsHint: Higher values speed up the migration but load source and target servers.
fileBrowser.scheduleHint: The migration starts automatically at the chosen time. You can cancel it at any time until then.
fileBrowser.bandwidthHint: Limited to {{limit}} Mbps. Can be adjusted during the migration.
fileBrowser.targetSelectSubtitle: // SELECT A DIRECTORY ON THE TARGET INSTANCE

errors.selectOne: Please select at least one directory, calendar or address book.
errors.futureTime: The scheduled start time must be in the future.
errors.networkError: Connection error while starting the transfer.

dashboard.serverUnreachableText: The connection to the migration server could not be established. Please make sure the server is running and reload the page.
dashboard.bgGuarantee: The migration transfer runs server-side. You can safely close this page.
dashboard.connLossText: An instance is not responding. The system pauses temporarily and checks reachability automatically every 60 seconds. Once the servers respond again, the transfer resumes exactly where it stopped.
dashboard.threadsHint: Higher values speed up the migration but load source and target servers. Changes apply immediately.
dashboard.cancelConfirm: Do you really want to cancel this migration? This cannot be undone.
dashboard.retryConfirm: Do you want to retry the failed items?
dashboard.noFailed: No failed items found to retry.
dashboard.bandwidthFailed: Bandwidth limit could not be updated.

migrations.welcomeSub: Manage and monitor your data transfers between cloud systems in real time from a central interface.
migrations.infoDelete: // INFO: To purge sensitive connection data and transfer logs, please use the delete icon.
migrations.deleteConfirm: Do you really want to permanently delete this migration? All transfer logs and stored credentials will be deleted.
migrations.loadFailed: Migration history could not be loaded.

settings.title: Settings
settings.avatarHint: Upload a new profile picture. PNG, JPEG, WebP and GIF up to 2 MB are supported.
settings.emailChangeAvailableHint: Mail service not configured – email change currently unavailable.
settings.backupCodesHint: Store these backup codes in a safe place. Each code works exactly once.
settings.disableHint: Enter your current password to disable two-factor authentication.
settings.setupHint: Protect your account with a time-based one-time password (TOTP) from an authenticator app.
settings.appearanceHint: Choose the application's appearance. Auto follows the system settings.
settings.allowRegistrationsHint: Turn off to block new user registrations system-wide. Existing logins remain active.
settings.deleteAvatarConfirm: Do you really want to delete your profile picture?
settings.smtpPasswordHint: Leave empty to keep the existing password.
settings.smtpNotifyHint: You will receive an email as soon as a migration is completed or failed.
